content:
The current way that Arcana Dominion works, is that you unlock the farming stages for different materials as you progress through the story since they are used by units, which are bound to certain chapters (for example Thais needs „Mother Tree‘s Remains“ so you need to beat chapter 7, which is her story, to unlock the farming stages for that material).
However, you do NOT unlock characters in the order that you complete chapters in. You can get Hameln day one, but need to first complete chapter 8 to be able to farm his skill materials. This makes it so that you cannot instantly start to farm his materials just because he happens to be part of a later story chapter. 
Bad luck, huh. Guess you should have gotten a character that appears in chapter 1 of the story.
So you can’t build the unit that you would want to build but instead have to focus on another unit (obviously Material Synthesis is a thing but it doesn’t change the fact that the current system behind Arcana Dominion is a bad one).

So I propose a more generic and time-proven approach:
Gives players access to stages related to all materials so they can farm what they need/ want and aren’t bound to when a character appears in the story. The system of unlocking more difficult and rewarding stages as you progress the game is fine (tho I would recommend making that based on chapter progress instead of player level) and can stay the way it is, but I really hope that you don’t have to unlock farming stages for certain materials through story progression.
This would obviously also mean that you have the same amount of stages with the same unlocking requirement per material since starting at a high level will still make it impossible for new players to farm the materials.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Change Arcane Dominion to a more generic approach

content:
At the moment you can't make a new Covenants Plans that include a piece that is currently used in another Plan.
I propose to let us include this pieces, but mark them as already used in another plan, because you can want to make different Plans for different Characters that still include pieces already used in another.
Using the same covenant for multiple character in the same team is not too common too, so that limitation is not even particularly relevant.
thread_title: QOL for Covenants Plans

content: would then add a warning when you are about to apply a wheel plan which needs a Covenant that another character in the same team has already equipped
thread_title: QOL for Covenants Plans

content:
It would be nice to have more options to sort characters by. The current options don't really provide anything of value therefore not seeing any use. 
A reworked system would provide an easier way to make teams since searching for a specific type of character becomes much easier especially in a game where the roster isn't exactly small + you need 20 units to clear all of d-tide a single time so it's not like the majority of characters just become irrelevant.
This means that this game requires usage and management of a ton of units, which can often be hard. Especially for newer players, which have a lot of units thrown at them early on due to the amount of pulls available when you start the game.

I recommend sortings based on what the characters do, like shielding, healing, buffs, debuffs, damage etc.
thread_title: Add more options to sort characters by

content: That would take good work to create a new series of tags for all characters, but for the future can be an interesting idea.
thread_title: Add more options to sort characters by
